clarity.notes: The page opens with a concise research thesis, then moves from evidence to publications, projects, education, and contact.

hierarchy.notes: Research output is visually dominant; real metrics and publication rows provide strong scanning anchors without competing cards.

typography.notes: Serif display type and relaxed sans body copy follow the Claude editorial system with readable desktop-first scaling.

motion.notes: A single calm reveal system, active navigation, and reduced-motion support create polish without distracting from academic content.

brand.notes: Parchment surfaces, warm neutrals, restrained terracotta, ring depth, and generous pacing remain consistent throughout.
